claim.text: Built and operates IntakeRouter, an agent triaging inbound claims email into 6 queues

findings.evidence_pointer: portfolio.md describes the system's problem, tool boundary, and a worked failure case with specifics
findings.rationale: An included work sample describes the built system concretely, not just asserts it.

claim.text: Designed an explicit human-approval gate: claims over $5,000 require adjuster approval

findings.evidence_pointer: portfolio.md 'Agent/tool boundary' section states the $5,000 / confidence<0.8 gate and that the agent cannot release
findings.rationale: The decision boundary and autonomy limit are described mechanically.

claim.text: Separated LLM classification from deterministic action; agent has no write access
claim.quote: Everything that ACTS is deterministic code

findings.rationale: Explicit statement of the LLM-vs-deterministic split and no write access.

claim.text: Wrote a 240-email labeled regression suite run nightly in CI
claim.quote: 240-email labeled set... nightly regression in CI

findings.rationale: The methodology is described but the suite itself is not in the package; a reviewer cannot inspect it here.

claim.text: Built an adversarial eval slice testing resistance to embedded instructions

findings.rationale: Described convincingly but the slice is not included to check.

claim.text: Caught and fixed a coverage gap: bilingual emails misrouted 31%

findings.evidence_pointer: portfolio.md 'A failure I caught' narrates the detection, root cause (4 French samples), and fix
findings.rationale: A specific failure-and-fix narrative with a number and a root cause reads as lived, not generic.

claim.text: Delivered work inside a regulated insurance environment with compliance approval

findings.rationale: Plausible and specific, but employer-side facts cannot be verified from candidate materials.

matcher_notes: Strong package: the candidate's claims are unusually checkable because they shipped a work sample. Unverified items are the normal kind (third-party facts, artifacts not included), not red flags.
